---
title: "Research"
---

<div class="paper-card">
<span class="badge-wip">In Progress</span>
<div class="paper-title">The Myth of the Myth of Independence: A Critical Response to Binder &amp; Spindel</div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zachary Thomas McDowell</div>
<div class="paper-date">July 2022 &ndash; Present</div>
<a class="btn-pdf" href="fed-paper.pdf" target="_blank">&#8594; View PDF</a>
</div>

---

<div class="paper-card">
<span class="badge-working">Working Paper</span>
<div class="paper-title">The Political Consequences of Falling Profit Rates: An Empirical Analysis of Private Welfare Spending in OECD Countries</div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zachary Thomas McDowell</div>
<div class="paper-date">February 2021 &ndash; May 2022</div>
<a class="btn-pdf" href="welfare-paper.pdf" target="_blank">&#8594; View PDF</a>
</div>

<div class="paper-card">
<span class="badge-working">Working Paper</span>
<div class="paper-title">The Complicated State of Welfare: Examining Divided Social Protection Systems in Advanced Democracies</div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zachary Thomas McDowell</div>
<div class="paper-date">January 2022 &ndash; May 2022</div>
<a class="btn-pdf" href="welfare-lit-review-2.1.pdf" target="_blank">&#8594; View PDF</a>
</div>
